name: DNXCorp SE
summary: DNXCorp S.E. engages in the development and promotion of Internet-based audience in Luxembourg and internationally. The company offers traffic generation, site development and services, multi-country payment solutions, video streaming technology, CRM analysis, etc. It operates consumer Websites in the entertainment and e-commerce markets. The company also offers Web traders with payment services. DNXCorp S.E. was incorporated in 1999 and is headquartered in Luxembourg, Luxembourg.
